title: 2026 Golden Globes: Major Winners Announced
text: The 83rd Annual Golden Globes ceremony, hosted by Nikki Glaser for the second consecutive year, celebrated achievements across film, television, and podcasting. Best Picture Musical or Comedy went to One Battle After Another, directed by Paul Thomas Anderson and starring Leonardo DiCaprio. Best Picture Drama went to Hamnet. The ceremony recognized outstanding supporting performances: Best Supporting Female Actor Motion Picture went to Teyana Taylor for her role in One Battle After Another, and Best Supporting Female Actor Television went to Erin Doherty for Adolescence. Netflix's limited series Adolescence emerged as a major winner, sweeping all four of the limited series categories it was nominated for, including acting honors for Owen Cooper, Erin Doherty, and Stephen Graham. Other notable winners included The Pitt (HBO drama series) with 2 awards, The Studio (Apple TV) with 2 awards, and KPop Demon Hunters with 2 awards, including Best Animated Motion Picture. The broadcast also marked the inaugural Golden Globe for podcasting, with Amy Poehler's Good Hang With Amy Poehler taking the inaugural prize, reflecting the expansion of Golden Globe recognition into new media formats.
